calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Authorizing Expenditure Of Trust Funds For Legal Expenses And Investigation
Off Calendar Aug-05-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Bryan appeared by zoom for Luana Smith (Trustee of the Exemption Trust).

The Court noted that what the parties are asking authority for are pretty routine duties of the Trustee, that trusts are administered without Court participation, that when it receives a petition like this it feels like the parties are asking the Court to step into the Trustees shoes and that it is not inclined to do that. Mr. Bryan stated that they have one Beneficiary who wrote himself a large number of checks, that the Beneficiary lives in Germany and is resistant to any dealings, and that they need a strong showing that they are going to compel an accounting of the funds he took. The Court stated that it will not micromanage this and that it is not going to approve step by step by step particularly when the outcome could change things. Mr. Bryan stated that the objective is to avoid any need for other orders, that they are outlining the steps that need to be taken, that it could be expensive, that the Beneficiary was a Trustee of the Survivor's Trust estate and that the Beneficiary took something well into six figures. Mr. Bryan also stated that they are indicating the scope of services that will be needed and the scope of the investigation, that the Court does not have to rule on that today, that it was intended to pre-authorize activity and not for the Court to decide on the issue, that this is being requested by the Trustee and that none of the other remaining Beneficiaries are opposed to this. The Petition for Order Authorizing Expenditure of Trust Funds for Legal Expenses and Investigation is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.
